General.Name: Chinese People Holdings Co Ltd
General.Description: Chinese People Holdings Company Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the sales and distribution of fuel gas in the People's Republic of China. The company operates through four segments: piped gas transmission and distribution, cylinder gas supply, gas distribution, and food ingredients supply and fast-moving consumer goods (FMCG). The company's Piped Gas Transmission and Distribution segment sells piped gas and construction of gas pipeline networks under gas connection contracts. Its Cylinder Gas Supply segment distributes and sells gas using tank containers to end-user households, and industrial and commercial customers. The company's Gas Distribution segment sells natural gas to industrial and commercial customers. Its FMCG and Food Ingredients Supply segment wholesales and retails merchandise, including rice, meat, and fresh food, as well as FMCG through supermarkets and convenience store. In addition, it offers information transmission, software and IT services; property investments and operation and other related business; and value-added services and wholesale and retail of household equipment, electric appliances, kitchen appliances and others. The company was formerly known as Chinese People Gas Holdings Company Limited and changed its name to Chinese People Holdings Company Limited in 2007. Chinese People Holdings Company Limited was incorporated in 1996 and is headquartered in Beijing, the People's Republic of China.
General.Address: No. 36 BDA International Business Park, Beijing, China
